seo.title: About Us — Guest House Grmovškov dom Kope
seo.description: Discover the story of Guest House Grmovškov dom Kope. A family-run mountain retreat offering ski-in/ski-out accommodation in the heart of Kope, Slovenia.

props.headline: Our Story
props.subheadline: A mountain retreat where adventure meets comfort

props.title: Family Tradition Since 1985
props.subtitle: Nestled in the Pohorje Mountains
props.story: Guest House Grmovškov dom Kope has been welcoming guests for nearly four decades. What started as a small family lodge has grown into a beloved mountain retreat, while maintaining the warm hospitality that defines us. Our ski-in/ski-out location makes us the perfect base for winter adventures, while our proximity to hiking and biking trails offers endless summer exploration.
props.mission: To provide authentic mountain hospitality where every guest feels at home, surrounded by nature's beauty.

props.title: What We Offer
props.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect mountain getaway

amenities.title: Ski-In/Ski-Out
amenities.description: Direct access to Kope ski slopes from your doorstep

amenities.title: Two Restaurants
amenities.description: Savor local and international cuisine on-site

amenities.title: Bar & Lounge
amenities.description: Relax with drinks after a day of adventure
